text: polos shelicha yeshu'a hamashicha biretson elohim el-haqedshim hanimetseim beefesos umaaminim bamashicha yeshu'a
chesed lakhem veshalom meet haelohim avinu vaadoneynu yeshu'a hamashicha
barukh haelohim vaavi adoneynu yeshu'a hamashicha asher berekhanu bekhal-birekat rucha bameromim bamashicha
kaasher bachar otanu vo lifeney mosedot tevel liheyot qedshim utemimim lefanayv beahava
ye'adanu lo levanim 'al-yedey yeshu'a hamashicha kiretson chefetso
litehilat kevod chasedo asher-chanan otanu bidido
asher-bo lanu hapideyom bedamo uselichat hapesha'im kerov chasedo
asher ba 'aleynu beshefa'-chakhema vehasekel
vehodi'a otanu et-sod chefetso kiretsono va'atsato merosh asher ya'ats bo
'al-devar hanehagato bimelot hayamim leqabel et-hakol bamashicha mah-shebashamayim umah-shebaarets
uvo laqachenu nachalatenu anachenu hameyu'adim lah milefanim bemachashevet po'el hakol ka'atsat chefetso
liheyot litehilat kevodo anachenu asher yichalenu el-hamashicha meaz
vaasher gam-atem shetulim bo acharey shame'akhem devar haemet et-besorat yeshu'atekhem vaasher bo kesheheemanetem gam-nechetametem berucha hahavetacha rucha haqodesh
ki ze 'erevon nachalatenu lifedot-lo 'am segula litehilat kevodo
ba'avur zot gam-anokhi acharey shame'i emunatekhem baadoneynu yeshu'a vehaahava asher-ahavetem et-kal-haqedshim
lo echedal mehodot ba'avurekhem behazekiri etekhem bitefiltay
sheyiten lakhem elohey adoneynu yeshu'a hamashicha avi hakavod et-rucha hachakhema vehechazon lada'at oto
veyaer 'eyney levavekhem lema'an tede'u mah-hi tochelet qeriato umah-'sher kevod nachalato baqedshim
umah-yiteron gedulat gevurato banu hamaaminim kefi fe'ulat 'otsem kocho
asher pa'al bamashicha beha'ir oto min-hametim vayoshivenu limino bameromim
mima'al lekhal-serara veshaletan ugevura umemeshala vekhol haniqera veshem lo-va'olam haze bilevad ki im-gam ba'olam haba
vayashet kol tachat ragelayv vayiten oto lerosh lekhol el-ha'eda
asher hi gufo melo shel-hamemale et-hakol bakol
gam-etekhem asher metim heyitem befishe'eykhem vechatoteykhem
asher hitehalakhetem bahem kedor ha'olam haze kiretson sar memeshelet haavir vehu harucha hapo'el ka'et biveney hameri
vegam-anachenu khulanu betokham halakhenu lefanim betaaot habasar la'asot chefetsey vesarenu umacheshevoteynu vanehi veney-rogez betive'enu kishear beney adam
aval-haelohim hamale rachamim berov ahavato asher ahav otanu
acharey heyotenu metim bapesha'im hecheyanu 'im-hamashicha bachesed nosha'etem
vaye'irenu ito af-hoshivanu bameromim bamashicha yeshu'a
lehareot badorot habaim et-gedulat 'sher chasedo betovato 'aleynu bamashicha yeshu'a
ki-vachesed nosha'etem 'al-yedey haemuna velo miyedekhem hayeta zot ki-matat elohim hi
lo mitokh hama'asim shel yitehalel ish
ki-fo'al elohim anachenu niveraim bamashicha yeshu'a lema'asim tovim asher hekhin haelohim miqedem lema'an nitehalekh bahem
'al-ken zikheru ki-atem mitechila hagoyim babasar haniqeraim 'arelim befi haniqeraim beney hamila shehi ma'ase yadayim babasar
ki-atem ba'et hahi heyitem beli mashicha zarim me'adat yiserael venakherim liveritot hahavetacha beeyn tiqeva uveeyn lakhem elohim ba'olam
ve'ata beyeshu'a hamashicha atem harechoqim meaz heyitem qerovim bedam hamashicha
ki hu shelomenu asher 'asa hashenayim echad veharas mechitsat hagader
bevatelo haeyva bivesaro et-torat hamitseot vehachuqot livero venafesho et-hashenayim leadam echad chadash vaya'as shalom
vayeratse et-sheneyhem beguf echad lelohim 'al-yedey tselivato bahamito venafesho et-haeyva
vayavo vayevaser lakhem shalom shalom larachoq velaqarov
ki 'al-yado yesh lisheneynu mavo berucha echad el-avinu
lakhen eynekhem 'od gerim vetoshavim ki-veney-'iram shel-haqedshim uveney beyt elohim atem
benuyim 'al-yesod hashelichim vehaneviim veyeshu'a hamashicha hu even hapina
asher chubar-bo yachad habineyan kulo 'ad asher-yigebah leheykhal qodesh layho
uvo nivenim gam-atem liheyot mishekan elohim barucha
ba'avur zot ani folos asir hamashicha lema'anekhem hagoyim
ki-amenam shema'etem hanehagat chesed haelohim asher-nitan li aleykhem
ki vechazon gilah-li hasod asher kataveti lakhem bime'at milin
uveqareakhem tukhelu lehakir et-binati besod hamashicha
asher badorot harishonim lo noda' liveney adam kaasher nigela 'ata lishelichayv haqedshim velineviayv barucha
sheyiheyu hagoyim gam-hem nochalim uveguf echad vechaverey hahavetacha bamashicha yeshu'a 'al-yedey habesra
asher hayiti lah limesharet bematenat chesed elohim hanetuna li kefi pe'ulat gevurato
li ani tse'ir hatse'irim shebekhal-haqedshim nitan hachesed haze levaser bagoyim et-'sher hamashicha asher rav hu leeyn cheqer
ulehair 'eyney khol lireot mah-hanehagat hasod hanisetar midorot 'olam belohim yotser hakol 'al-yedey yeshu'a hamashicha
lema'an asher tivada' 'ata 'al-yedey ha'eda lasarim velashalitim asher bameromim chakhemat elohim hamafelia derakheyha
'al-pi 'atsat 'olamim asher ya'ats bamashicha yeshu'a adoneynu
asher bo pitechon pe lanu umavo bevitecha 'al-yad emunato
'al-ken avaqesh shel techatu betsarotay lema'anekhem ki-hi tifearetekhem
ba'avur zot ekhere'a 'al-birekay lifeney avi adoneynu yeshu'a hamashicha
asher niqera shemo 'al kal-mishepacha shebashamayim veshebaarets
latet lakhem lefi-'sher kevodo sheyitechazeq bigevura 'al-yedey rucho haadam hapenimi
sheyishekon hamashicha bilevavekhem 'al-yedey haemuna viheyitem masherishim umeyusadim beahava
lema'an tukhelu lehavin kekhal-haqedshim me harochav vehaorekh veha'omeq vehagovah
vida'etem et-ahavat hamashicha hana'ala 'al-kal-da'at venimeletem et-kal-melo haelohim
vehayakhol leharebot gemulayv 'aleynu yoter mikal-mishealoteynu umacheshevoteynu lefi hakocha hapo'el beqirebenu
lo hakavod beqerev haqahal bamashicha yeshu'a ledor vador 'ad-'olemey 'olamim amen
'al-ken azehirekhem ani haasur baadon lehitehalekh kaasher yaata lemishemaretekhem asher niqeretem lah
bekhal-nemikhut va'anava uveorekh rucha laset ish et-re'ehu beahava
veshiqedu lishemor et-achadut harucha baagudat hashalom
guf echad verucha echad kaasher gam-niqeretem betiqevat mishemaretekhem haechat
adon echad emuna achat tevila echat
el veav echad lakol shehu 'al-kol veet-kol uvetokh kol
aval lekhal-echad veechad mimenu nitan hechased kemidat matenat hamashicha
'al-ken hu omer 'ala lamarom shava shevi vayiten matanot laadam
ve'ala sheamar mah-hu im-lo sheyarad miqodem letachetiot arets
hu hayored vehu ha'ole lema'ela mikal-hashamayim lema'an yemale et-hakol
vehu natan et-ele shelichim veet-ele neviim veet-ele mevaserim veet-ele ro'im umelamedim
lehashelim et-haqedshim lema'ase ha'avoda levineyan guf hamashicha
'ad ki-nagi'a kulanu leachadut haemuna veda'at ben-haelohim keish echad shalem leshi'ur qomat melo hamashicha
velo-niheye 'od yeladim nigerashim venidafim bekhal-rucha halimud betaremit beney adam umoqeshotam asher shatu lehate'ot
ki im-nedaber haemet beahava venigedela vekhal-davar lo lamashicha asher hu harosh
asher mimenu kal-haguf hamurekav umedubaq bekhal-chibur hashimush kemidat hakocha hanatun lekhal-evar veevar yirebe veyigedal lehashelamat bineyano beahava
vehine zot ani omer ume'id baadon ki me'ata lo-telekhu 'od keyeter hagoyim haholekhim behaveley sikhelam
chashukhey hada'at umuzarim lechayey elohim mipeney ivaletam asher bahem ki-tach mehasekil levavam
asher hisheminu vayitenu et-nafesham lazima la'asot kal-to'eva livetso'a batsa'
veatem lo khen lemadetem et-hamashicha
im-amenam shema'etem oto uvo lumadetem kefi haemet asher beyeshu'a
lasur midarekheykhem harishonim velifeshot et-haadam hayashan hanishechat betaaot remiya
lehitechadesh berucha sikhelekhem
velilebsh et-haadam hechadash hanivera kidemut elohim bitsedaqa uqedushat haemet
'al-ken hasiru mikem et-hasheqer vedaberu emet ish et-re'ehu ki evarim anachenu ish leachiv
rigezu veal-techetau velo tavo hashemesh 'al-ragezekhem
veal-titenu maqom lasatan
mi sheganav al-yosef ligenov ki im-yiga' uveyadayv ya'ase et-hatov lema'an yiheyeh-lo latet leish machesor
velo-yetse mipikhem kal-devar nibul ki im-hatov vehamo'il livenot lefi hatsorekh lema'an yiten chen leshome'ayv
velo te'atsevu et-rucha haqodesh shel-elohim asher nechetametem bo leyom hageula
kal-merirut vechema varogez utse'aqa vegiduf tasiru mikem 'im kal-harishe'a
viheyu tovim ish lere'ehu verachamanim venoseim ish lechatat achiv kaasher nasa lakhem haelohim bamashicha
uvekhen lekhu bedarekhey haelohim kevanim chavivim
vehitehalekhu beahava kaasher gam-hamashicha ahav otanu vehiqeriv et-nafesho ba'adenu leqareban vazevach lelohim lereycha nichocha
aval zenut vekhal-tumea veahavat betsa' bal-yizakher beyneykhem kaasher nave laqedshim
gam-lo nibul pe vediverey sikhelut litsanut mah-shel khehogen ki im-qol toda
ki-zot yado'a tede'u ki khal-zone vetame veohev betsa' asher ke'oved elilim eyn-lo cheleq venachala bemalekhut hamashicha vehaelohim
al-yasi ish etekhem bediverey riq ki vigelal-ele charon elohim yavo 'al-beney hameri
'al-ken al-yehi cheleqekhem 'imahem
ki milefanim heyitem chshekh ve'ata hinekhem or baadoneynu hitehalekhu-na kiveney or
ki-feri haor kal-ma'asey chesed vetsedeq veemet
livechon meh-haratsuy be'eyney adoneynu
veal-tishetatefu bema'asey hachshekh asher lo-ya'asu feri ki im-hokhecha tokhichu otam
ki mah-shehem 'osim baseter cherepa lesaper
aval kal-zot yegule kesheyukhach 'al-yedey haor ki khal-hanigele or hu
'al-ken hu omer 'ura hayashen vequma min-hametim veyaer lekha hamashicha
ve'ata reu vehizaharu shel titehalekhu kakesilim ki im-kachakhamim
moqirim hasha'a ki hayamim ra'im hema
'al-ken al-tiheyu chaserey da'at ki im-mevinim lada'at ma retson adoneynu
veal-tishetakeru miyayin hamevi lidey feritsut ki im-himaleu rucha
utehi sichatekhem ish et-re'ehu tehilot vetishebachot veshirot ruchaniot shiru vezameru ladonay bilevavekhem
vehodu bekhal-'et 'al-hakol lelohim avinu beshem adoneynu yeshu'a hamashicha
hikane'u ish leachiv beyireat elohim
hanashim hikana'ena leva'aleykhen kemo laadoneynu
ki haish hu-rosh haisha kaasher hamashicha hu rosh ha'eda vehu moshi'a shel-haguf
aval kaasher tikana' ha'eda lamashicha af ken-hanashim leva'aleyhen lekhal-davar
haanashim ehevu et-nesheykhem kaasher gam-hamashicha ahav et-ha'eda vayiten et-nafesho ba'adah
lema'an qadeshah bidevaro acharey asher-tiharah birechitsat hamayim
lahaqimah bekhavod lo le'eda asher eyn-bah ketem vaqemet ukhedome ki im-lema'an tiheye qedosha utemima
ken haanashim chayavim leehov et-nesheyhem kegufam ki haohev et-isheto ohev et-'atsemo
ki me'olam lo-sane ish et-besaro ki im-zan umekhalekel oto kaasher gam-haadon et-'adato
ki-evarey gufo anachenu mibesaro ume'atsamayv
'al-ken ya'azav-ish et-aviv veet-imo vedavaq beisheto vehayu sheneyhem levasar echad
gadol hasod haze vaani poter oto bamashicha veha'eda
veulam gam-atem kal-ish mikem yeehav et-isheto kenafesho vehaisha hi tizaher vetira et-ba'elah
shime'u banim el-horeykhem baadoneynu ki-orach ysher hu
kabed et-avikha veet-imekha zot hi hamitseva harishona shematan sekharah betsidah
lema'an yitav lakh ulema'an yaarikhun yameykha 'al-haadama
veatem haavot al-takhe'isu et-beneykhem vegadelu otam bemusar adoneynu uvetokhacheto
shime'u 'avadim el-adoneykhem min-habasar beyirea varetet uvetam-levavekhem kishemo'a lamashicha
lo va'avoda shehi lemaree 'eynayim kimevaqeshim limetso chen be'eyney veney-adam ki im-ke'avedey hamashicha ha'osim retson haelohim bekhal-nafesham
la'avod benefesh chafetsa et-haadon velo veney adam
vida'etem ki kal-davar tov asher 'asa haadam yeshalemenu lo adoneynu beyn shehu-'eved uveyn shehu ven-chorin
veatem haadonim kakha ta'asu gam-lahem chidelu mige'ar-bam vida'etem ki gam-'aleykhem yesh adon bashamayim veeyn lefanayv mas fanim
sof davar echay chizequ vaadoneynu uve'oz gevurato
liveshu keley-nesheq elohim lema'an tukhelu 'amod neged nikheley hasatan
ki lo 'im-basar vadam milechama lanu ki 'im-sarim veshalitim 'im-hamshelim becheshekat ha'olam haze 'im-haruchot hara'ot asher bameromim
'al-ken echezu bikheley-nesheq elohim lema'an tukhelu laqum bayom hara' ulemale tsevaakhem vela'amod
'imedu-na chagurey haemet bemateneykhem ulevushim shireyon hatsedeq
verageleykhem mune'alot liheyot mukhanim livesorat hashalom
ve'al-kal-ele tifesu et-magen haemuna asher tukhelu lekhabot bo et-chitsey harasha' hadoleqim
uqechu et-kova' hayeshu'a vecherev harucha shehi devar haelohim
vehatemidu vekhal-'et bitefila vetachanunim barucha veshiqedu vehiteametsu leha'etir yachad be'ad kal-haqedshim
vegam-ba'adi lema'an yinaten-li hadavar befitechi fi legalot beomets lev et-sod habesora asher ani melitsah bemoserot
lema'an adaber bah kaasher mutal 'alay ledaber velo echat
ulema'an asher tede'u gam-atem et-qorotay veet-ma'asay hine tukhiqos haach hechaviv vehamesharet haneeman baadoneynu yagid lakhem hakol
asher lazot shelachetihu aleykhem lehodi'akhem et-qoroteynu ulema'an yenachem et-levavekhem
hashalom laachim vehaahava 'im-haemuna meet haelohim haav umeet haadon yeshu'a hamashicha
hachesed 'im-kal-haohavim et-adoneynu yeshu'a hamashicha beahava asher lo-tikhele amen ﻿
